Video.summary: When Nick Colette, the hot-headed son of a "retired" mobster Tommy Colette, joins forces with his father, Eastbridge's crime troubles start.
Video.title: Family Business

Video.summary: When the majority of Tony's officers stage a sick-out in the wake of a wage dispute, Eastbridge becomes an open city for crime.
Video.title: Blue Flu

Video.summary: Following the death of his gangster son in a police shootout, mobster Tommy Colette vows to kill Tony Scali himself.
Video.title: Out Of Business

Video.summary: One of Tony's men, Danny Nolan, goes ballistic when Joe Lund, the gun-wielding ex-husband of the woman Dan's been seeing, takes her hostage.
Video.title: The Ides Of March

Video.summary: Stella Stevens guest stars as a reclusive former movie queen -- and one of Tony's all-time fim favorites -- who is implicated in the real-life murder of her lover.
Video.title: Eastbridge Boulevard

Video.summary: The death of another female cop has a deep psychological effect on Rita.
Video.title: Jasmine

Video.summary: When one of the young men on the basketball team Chris coaches is found murdered, Chris and Rita investigate.
Video.title: Crush

Video.summary: Chris and Rita discover that a deranged woman planning to kill her lover is part of an elaborate scheme.
Video.title: Was It Good For You Too?

Image.alt: Was It Good For You Too?
Was It Good For You Too?
Was It Good For You Too?

Video.summary: An investment advisors murder implicates his wife, a mistress and his personal trainer.
Video.title: Dead Weight

Video.summary: The romance between a devious 17 year old girl and a doctor gets out of hand when she murders his wife.
Video.title: Kid Stuff

Video.summary: A couple finds themselves in big trouble when their bizarre sex games go awry and a man is killed.
Video.title: Night Games

Video.summary: Rita goes undercover for the FBI to break up an international white slavery ring.
Video.title: Meat Market

Video.summary: Bobby finds his liquid assets quickly evaporating when his banker embezzles 150 million dollars and heads to sunny Mexico.
Video.title: Rancho Escondido

Video.summary: Reno and Bobby get more than they gambled for when they head to Las Vegas in pursuit of an escaped bank robber suffering from multiple personalities.
Video.title: Cop For A Day

Video.summary: Bobby gets a new lesson in fear when he heads up to Santa Barbara State College after a serial killer responsible for the disappearance of 5 coeds.
Video.title: Stalker's Moon

Video.summary: Reno tackles a new profession while trying to flush out the killer of 3 "Repo Men".
Video.title: Repo Raines

Video.summary: Reno attempts to capture a murderer while meeting with a local Real Estate dealer, which results in the real estate dealer's death during a gunfire exchange.
Video.title: Ace In The Hole

Video.summary: Reno finds himself in a precarious situation when he becomes the latest target of a bounty hunter known as a "living legend" as well as Bobby's teacher and mentor.
Video.title: Living Legend

Video.summary: Reno finds his patience tested while attempting to protect a wealthy socialite and murder witness.
Video.title: Family Ties

Video.summary: Three fhends are stalked by a serial killer; Chris worries after turning to Cotton for help with a tax audit.
Video.title: Team Spirit

Video.summary: Chris falls for a suspected mob assassin.
Video.title: The Perfect Alibi

Video.summary: Rita and Chris must protect Donnie 'Dogs' Dibarto from a notorious mobster named Tony 'Toe Tag' Torino, when he attempts to muscle in on a piece of Dibarto's action and Dibarto decides to turn state's evidence. The situation gets further complicated when a Miami cop named Dexter, who's running the investigation on Torino and is suppose to be providing protection for Dibarto may or may not be on the up and up. When the hitters start getting too close, Rita and Chris must try and determine if Dexter is a 'dirty cop' or not.
Video.title: To Serve And Protect

Video.summary: Rita and Chris pursue a call girl killer.
Video.title: Tough Love

Video.summary: A seductive ex-cop tries to blackmail some politically prominent lovers with a tell-all book.
Video.title: Sex, Lies And Yellow Tape

Video.summary: When a man is killed by an intruder, Chris and Rita investigate. They naturally turn their attention to the man's wife. But they later shift their focus on the man's assistant who lives with them. They learn that she's a criminal who's lying low, waiting for the statue of limitations on her crime to run out.
Video.title: Schemes Like Old Times
